subject: fix(pwa): add type declarations for virtual:pwa-register/react
body:
Production build failed because TypeScript couldn't find types for the
virtual:pwa-register/react module. Added the triple-slash reference to
vite-env.d.ts and explicit parameter types on the SW callbacks.

Tags: pwa, typescript, build
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: patch
